hotel_name: Four Points by Sheraton Hà Giang (Four Points by Sheraton Ha Giang)

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
I felt i am in school everything finishes early no flexibility in pool or anything 
Even the club closes at 9:30 and sometimes it was closed. The app says mountain view but it doesn’t you can see the city. Very disappointing and the restaurant is very expensive and not even good quantity

reviews.title: Very nice
reviews.positives: Loved the property
reviews.negatives: The bar area had a horrible smell

reviews.title: A nice hotel
reviews.text: Facilities were world class, just a shame i couldn’t use the spa, get a beverage delivered to my room and the breakfast wasn’t stocked when I arrived. A really nice hotel though with world class facilities and extremely comfy bed and room with a beautiful room.

reviews.title: Just fine
reviews.positives: It was all good
reviews.negatives: At the top floor bar I was given a menu of beers only to find out they only had 1....same in the restaurant many things on the menu were not available

reviews.title: Rat that is awesome!!!
reviews.text:
I booked a room through Agoda (with the filter for including children aged 14) but there was no mention of an additional fee for a 14-year-old child. Upon arrival, I learned about an extra charge of 900,000 VND. (The hotel stated they had contacted Agoda, however, I was driving so I didn't check). 

Other hotels that have additional fees directly adjust the prices on the sales listing. This is a very poor experience and the first time I've encountered this in over a decade of booking rooms through Agoda. 

The breakfast buffet was not diverse, not up to the 5-star standard. 

The hallway did not have the air conditioning on, making it very smelly, hot, and stuffy. 

When I drove to the hotel, there was no staff to greet or assist with parking or carrying luggage. I had to wait about 5 minutes for someone to run out, but it seemed they were just filling in, with a lack of proper training. 

The decorative carpet in the bedroom was too frugal, with three tiny carpets that did not cover all sides of the bed; getting off the bed from the foot side would mean stepping directly onto the floor. Because the carpet was so small, it could easily shift, posing a risk of falling for children and the elderly. 

P.S.: The facilities are new and well-invested. However, there are still many flaws that need serious correction.

reviews.title: Just ok for a 5 star hotel.
reviews.positives: Restaurant food was very delicious.
reviews.negatives: The service in the restaurant was not good.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
A very clean and comfortable hotel close to the city center. 
We enjoyed our room and spa. 
Wet and dry sauna is a nice bonus. 
I will definitely stay in this hotel when I’m back to Ha Giang.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Very new and nice property, great value for the price
reviews.negatives: The staff at the restaurant needs more training.

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.text: Phòng rộng, sạch sẽ, thiết kế đẹp. Khu vực đỗ ô tô cho khách không có ghi chú hoặc hướng dẫn rõ ràng. Đỗ xe ven đường, trường hợp hết chỗ phải đỗ trên vỉa hè, với các xe gầm thấp dễ va gầm. Chưa kể tới việc bị các xe khác đỗ xe chặn đầu đuôi và bên cạnh dưới lòng đường, khó di chuyển lấy xe ra.

reviews.title: Amazing, relaxing place in Ha Giang
reviews.positives:
A great deal to actually stay for over a week in a Sheraton/Marriott for such a low price, including breakfast.  (only ever stayed in them during years of business travel)
So affordable, large room on 18th floor with exceptional mountain views. Bed super comfortable, WiFi 👍🏼 clean.
We took a lot of great day trips from here, ate in town or up in the mountains with families.  Took a day and walked the back roads and saw gorgeous buildings, people exercising-more relaxing than the main streets.  
Jasmine at the front desk is top notch and represents the hotel in a classy, professional manner.  Giang in the restaurant is super intelligent-his English WOW and Phinh making eggs and seen in various capacities—wonderful employees. Actually, everyone we met was impressive.  Employees deserve recognition.
Recommend the hotel.
reviews.negatives:
What might be modified:
- the large coffee machine (but weak coffee) broke the 2nd day we were there.
- a small coffee machine replaced it, seemed temporarily, but actually with better coffee, but tiny & slow if you have large groups.
Sheraton/Marriotts have standardization of course but would be nice to sometimes perhaps have a breakfast cake or sweet that truly represents wonderful Vietnam.
OVERALL thank you!!!

reviews.title: Suitable for families with small children.
reviews.text: Central location. The ground floor is Vincom Plaza, and the nearby amenities are quite sufficient, making it convenient. It is an international brand hotel, so one can feel assured when choosing. The utility services and breakfast are at a basic level. There are a few staff members, so the reception was not timely. Overall, I am satisfied and will return if I visit Ha Giang again.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Good service, good cleaned rooms, good bathroom, laundry service was very good
reviews.negatives: Some items were not restocked while having breakfast

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
Its a "by Sheraton" so I won't commenton anything on the room or property. It's perfect with the orginal room price. Also have a gym and a pool. 
BUT
I book double room for 3 people, so they added a bed. The original room price was ~ 1.2 M VND. The extra bed fee? 1M VND :) Thats almost the room price already. And I didn't see this fee anywhere until I clicked book. If I knew this I would have book 2 rooms. BE WARE ABOUT THIS if you're planning for an odd number of people. 
Thats how they get us! Cheers =)

reviews.title: Relief that the staff speaks English in this part of the province
reviews.positives:
Location
Comfortable
Staff speaks English 
Good breakfast
reviews.negatives:
Staff in the lounge cafe.
Took them half an hour to make FOJ which they served it yo the wrong table.

My husband ordered national drink - salty coffee. Half an hour later, they took us that they don't have the makings of the coffee. My husband requested for water instead and he was served room temperature water.

reviews.title: It's okay.
reviews.text: The restroom should have an exhaust system, the glass door is covered with many cobwebs on the outside, the non-inverter air conditioning doesn't cool down regularly, making temperature adjustment a bit difficult, the breakfast options are not diverse enough, and more attention needs to be paid to food safety during the cooking process! There is no parking basement or shaded parking area. The staff is very friendly and enthusiastic, but they need to be more proactive in addressing customer issues. Overall, I'm satisfied and will return if I have the chance to visit Ha Giang; I hope the service will be better by then!

reviews.title: Comfortable stay, the staff needs some time to ramp up.
reviews.positives: The hotel was new and pretty and equipped with everything one could need. The staff was helpful.
reviews.negatives: The staff was still learning the ropes and communicate

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: Nice modern clean hotel.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Very new, nice hotel

reviews.title: Modern, new and a great respite
reviews.text: After traveling around the mountains, this was a great oasis for a quick recuperation. Staff are a little newish in the restaurant and food just ok,  but overall the hotel offers good service and we’d definitely stay here again. The view from the bar on the top floor is stunning.

reviews.title: Best hotel in Ha Giang
reviews.positives:
Everything was perfect. Large comfortable rooms, great view, delicious breakfast, high quality of construction and furnishings. I highly recommend this hotel if you want some extra comfort while preparing to ride the Ha Giang loop and when coming back.

Thank you Tuan Nguyen the bellboy, for all the good tips and friendly services!

reviews.title: Nice recovery after Ha Giang loop
reviews.text: Property seems relatively new.  No in-room dinning service when I arrived, but dinner in the restaurant was adequate. Steam room/sauna in spa, requires fee or with package.  Indoor pools looks nice.  Breakfast is adequate and consistant with this class of hotel.  Really nice to be  in the mist of chaos!

reviews.title: We highly recommend this place, especially as compared to other properties in the area.
reviews.positives: We stayed at this hotel after completing the Ha Giang loop. It was a great place to clean up and unwind. Great shower and comfortable bed and bedding. Breakfast was great. Everything it new and clean
reviews.negatives: Some kind of goofy lighting but not a big deal.

reviews.title: Fabulous hotel for a great price
reviews.text: Exceptional hotel facilities and staff were great.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: One of THE BEST value for money. Extremely new, modern, and luxurious hotel with a very decent and fair price. The room was out of this world, breathtaking views, and incredible staff. We highly recommend this hotel if planning to stay in Ha Giang

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Excellent service and modern, spacious rooms

reviews.title: I can’t fault anything about stay
reviews.positives: Absolutely loved our stay here ! Great location and Staff was super nice and friendly

reviews.title: 1 night
reviews.text: Everything was exceptional, have no complaints.  There's only one issue that we don't understand.  We reserved a King Bed room but when we get there, they apologized that all the king size ones were not available, and offer us 2 Twins beds.  The price was the same so we are nice and said ok.  What we don't understand is that this is a huge hotel with at least 19 floors.  There were hardly a lot of guests that we see.  When we went to breakfast around 8:30, there were only 4 families eating breakfast.  Just don't understand why they changed our reservation.  It's still the best hotel in Ha Giang and a very good price.

reviews.title: Only one night before Ha Giang loop I stayed and it was memorable.
reviews.positives: Very good breakfast catered to match with everybody's expectations.
reviews.negatives: None

reviews.title: Clean with great facilities.
reviews.text: Clean room and good facilities available.

reviews.title: Amazing!!! Can’t recommend enough
reviews.positives: The best place I stayed in all of Vietnam and just what I needed after completing the loop. The bed was so comfy, food delicious. I had the gym, sauna and steam room to myself! I checked in and didn’t leave the hotel til check out time. A true treat!
reviews.negatives: Nothing it was perfect

reviews.title: Exceptional stay
reviews.text: We only booked for one night but we were were so impressed we decided to stay a second before doing The Loop. The hotel is keeping our cases safe until our return. It will be lovely to come back and have a relaxing couple of days after a week travelling on a motorbike and staying in home stays. The staff are so very helpful, nothing too much trouble.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.positives: Everything
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Awesome Hotel
reviews.text: Room immaculate and inviting.  Bed comfortable. Spacious. All staff are kind and helpful. Location on edge of town, but short 10-15 walk for  local restaurants. Please update Google Maps to correctly show entrance is around the corner from main atreet.

reviews.title: Impressive, full service hotel in a rather remote location, worth the journey to Ha Giang!
reviews.positives: Highly professional staff who seem to enjoy their work. The dining room provided a huge selection for breakfast with a great view. The kitchen area is visible and the happy chefs could be seen observing food safety and maintaining a clean and orderly kitchen. Quality beds, room furnishings and exercise equipment.
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: Best hotel I stayed in in Vietnam
reviews.text:
It felt like I was the first traveler to use the room. Everything was sparkling clean and brand new. 
The location is on the edge of town so you'll need a taxi to go anywhere, but the facilities are absolutely worth it.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Big room, very clean

reviews.title: Sheraton stay
reviews.text: Place was a great choice to relax inbetween a busy holiday! The pool, gym and sauna was luxury! The bed was very comfy and rooms super clean and pretty. The staff was nice, it was quite empty in November but worth it for the price for sure!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Wonderful room, clean, cozy, huge by Vietnam standards. As expected.

reviews.title: great experience
reviews.text: this place has everything you could wish for. friendly reception. gym is amazing, room service oustanding (although portions are small! beware if you're really hungry) and the view is just mindblowing.

reviews.title: A warm oasis after 3 wonderful days doing the loop.
reviews.positives:
The room was perfect
Bed warm and comfortable
reviews.negatives:
Not many restaurants options in area.
Hotel dining was just okay.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Hotel location is a little far off from the actual Ha Giang town area and seems to be a new area that is being developed. Food options around the area are quite limited but the rooms are perfect, have very comfortable beds and the breakfast buffet is good. Hotel and rooms are also very new as well. Highly recommended for those looking to stay a night in Ha Giang.

reviews.title: 10/10 recommend
reviews.positives: Clean, modern and comfortable. Such a needed stay after doing the Ha Giang Loop. We were only there 1 night but will definitely come back.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I really like the scent in the hotel lobby. The hotel is clean, with a luxurious design, worth the money.

reviews.title: Unexpected luxury in Ha Giang
reviews.positives: Amazing 4-star quality hotel in the heart of Ha Giang, much nicer than I expected to find in this area, and the room rate was very affordable thru Booking.com. The spa/sauna is a great addition, especially after returning from the strenuous Ha Giang loop (self-riding :)... Food was pretty good in the restaurant, pool was great for lap swimming, really long pool.
reviews.negatives: One of the rooms we stayed in had some glitches in the thermostat, either only A/C, or only heat available, had to call maintenance to fix, but they were very fast and responsive anytime we needed help. The sauna/steam rooms are left off when not in use, so it takes about 15min once you arrive to let things heat up, but once they're on, it's amazing. One of the rooms had a very noisy HVAC system that made it a bit hard to sleep w/o ear plugs, but I'm sure they will fix soon, and the first room we stayed in was super quiet.

reviews.title: Top hotel
reviews.text: Got stuck here during floods after typhoon looked after us so much. Was the only hotel in town with electric so lucky to book here thank you everyone.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Just perfect

reviews.title: Bars and food
reviews.text:
Lobby bar shut at 6 pm
Even though happy hour was 5 till 7 
We got there at 6.30 would not serve us.
Roof top bar shut completely 
Main  restaurant  food was higher priced
But staff great 
Spar great 
Left lounge there while doing 3day loop tour
Came back and could still us all facilities  until bus pick us up at night time for next leg of you tour

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Clean and quiet

reviews.title: Caution required for ventilation facilities.
reviews.text: The newly opened hotel at Haja has significance as the only chain brand hotel. However, we should take measures regarding the smell, possibly from poor construction materials used in the new building, particularly with sewer odors in the rooms and especially in the hallways. There weren't many customers, possibly due to insufficient promotion, so I had a very quiet stay. The kindness, service mindset, and warmth of the staff were strongly felt.

reviews.title: A good break out of the beaten track
reviews.positives: Everything. Great place
reviews.negatives: Probably one extra espresso machine at breakfast .

reviews.title: Absolutely Amazing. Highly recommend
reviews.text: I had the best time in this hotel. From the decor, the room, the breakfast, the views, the facilities, the comfortable bed, the staff. I could not be happier. This was one of my highlights whilst doing the loops in Ha Giang.  Special mention to Jasmine, the lovely staff member who was so warm and friendly, always with a smile and so cool! I will stay here again 100% definitely way worth the money.  Highly recommend this is the best hotel in Ha Giang.

reviews.title: Great hotel would definitely stay again
reviews.positives: Beautiful hotel. Rooms are awesome and the bed is so comfortable. I booked a massage at their spa and it was the best one I had in a month long stay in Vietnam. The staff are so kind and helpful, the bartender at the rooftop bar was so sweet, the front desk people were amazing.
reviews.negatives: There are not a lot of food options close to the hotel

reviews.title: The best hotel in Ha Giang
reviews.text: Newly built hotel, so everything is very good! High recommend!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: It looks really new. Been in many hotels and this hotel was well qbove my expectations.

reviews.title: Everything was excellent
reviews.text: Everything was excellent very very good service location. Excellent. I will definitely recommend it especially value for money.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Our stay was absolutely amazing – this is honestly one of the best hotels we have ever stayed at in Vietnam. It is very luxurious and beautifully designed in a unique and artistic way.
The hotel was spotlessly clean, the food was excellent, and the service was outstanding.

A special thank you to the incredible staff – everyone was so kind, professional, and helpful. They truly made us feel welcomed and taken care of during our entire stay.

We highly recommend this hotel without hesitation. A top experience that we strongly encourage travelers to choose!

Thank you for everything! ❤️

reviews.title: Great Value
reviews.text: Definitely book here if you're coming to Ha Giang, highly recommend this hotel

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great value for money, nice stay for a night before the loop.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Great hotel, clean, modern, comfortable, well worth it! 
Highly recommend

reviews.title: Perfect R&R after Ha Giang Loop
reviews.positives: If you’re reading this considering booking after your Ha Giang Loop tour, I cannot recommend this hotel highly enough. I stayed with my 6.5 year old daughter. Having been dropped off at 3pm, we essentially postponed our 6h return to Hanoi by 24 hours and my word this was the best decision ever. Room was on 17th floor, incredible views. We headed straight for the pool which is gorgeous with swim floats, flippers and balls for kids (also peaceful for adults with poolside beds). We skipped breakfast so can’t comment on that but there’s a shopping centre literally next door with a great food court and floors with a soft play, roller skating, bumper cars, kids painting activities - and massage chairs for adults. Paradise for my daughter. For adults, there are some nice coffee shops again just outside and a hotel lobby bar. The hotel gave us a free late check out until 2pm then we headed back to the pool again, completely refreshed for our car back to Hanoi. For the price we paid, this was a bargain and if you can spare the extra day, do it. Pool is open 6am-10am and 2pm-7pm.
reviews.negatives: Was no real problem for us but we had a problem with our fridge, engineer came and fixed it in 5 minutes! No drinks in minibar. We went up to the 20th floor to see the bar but it was closed (must be lovely when it’s open so hopefully they sort this out).

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I have been living in Vietnam for 16 years and am doing business three hours away from Sapa. Whenever I go to Sapa, I often stay at the Pistachio Hotel. I am grateful that the staff remembers me and appreciates the fruit and the handwritten letters. They also upgrade my room every time. Nowadays, seeing many Koreans visit here makes me feel that people are all the same at heart. All the staff are kind, the hotel is clean, and all the tourist attractions are close by. Even after coming to Sapa dozens of times over 16 years, it is truly a pleasant hotel.

reviews.title: Great value for money, new hotel
reviews.positives:
Great breakfast, beautiful and spacious room. 
Great gym and everything is new. Value for money is perfect

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: a variety of selections for breakfast

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything was great and beautiful.
reviews.negatives: The restaurant at the roof had absolutely terrible service. Don’t eat there.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great choice for staying in Ha Giang, Viet Nam

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Fits every description of what a Marriot hotel should be, the standard is top notch 👌
reviews.negatives: I didn't like that there was no AC in the hotel elevators or the floor level lobbies but that doesn't constitute it being a bad stay

reviews.title: What you’d expect
reviews.text: With Sheraton, there are no surprises. You know where you are, and you know what you can expect. There are no surprises and no disappointments.

reviews.title: Beautiful, Clean, Modern Hotel in Ha Giang
reviews.positives: The interior of the hotel was a beautiful modern building, all very new, nicely designed, and in perfect condition.   I was sick so we wanted a warm and comfortable place to rest and recuperate and this was perfect.   We had very attentive service and would definitely recommend staying here.
reviews.negatives: Room service menu and food could be improved.

reviews.title: Best hotel in Ha Giang
reviews.text: If you stay in Ha Giang, Four Points is a place to stay. A 5 star hotel. Very satisfied customer

reviews.title: Amazing hotel in Ha Giang!
reviews.positives: Amazing hotel. New since December but they have everything running smoothly. Room, amenities, service was simply top-notch. Jasmine at the front desk really went above and beyond to help us catch our bus. A+ totally recommend!

reviews.title: Outstanding
reviews.text: A new hotel offering all the comforts.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Friendly stuff and really nice.

reviews.title: Amazing!!!
reviews.text: The best hotel we stayed at in Vietnam by far!!!! Amazing facilities and worth the price 100%!!!!!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Hotel just opened. Staff is competent and very accommodating

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: I had an excellent stay at Four Points by Sheraton Ha Giang and would happily rate it 5 stars. The hotel is new, beautifully designed, and feels like a true international-standard property right in the center of Hà Giang City, with stunning mountain and city views from the rooms and rooftop. My room was spacious, spotless, and very comfortable, with a great bed, powerful shower, and all the modern amenities I needed after long days on the Hà Giang Loop. The staff were consistently friendly, professional, and genuinely tried their best to make the stay smooth and memorable, from check-in to restaurant service

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: La habitación era muy espaciosa y el colchón muy cómodo. Además los productos del baño eran de buena calidad.
reviews.negatives: El desayuno dejó bastante que desear. No había mucha variedad y muchos estantes estaban vacíos, lo que creo que da mala imagen.

reviews.title: Excellent one night stay towards the loop
reviews.text:
Stayed for one night before the ha giang loop. The facilities were great and comfortable and so was the breakfast. The staff were welcoming and helpful as we came in towards 22:00 and left by 07:30. 
Value for money is impressive!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Hotel precioso
reviews.negatives: El personal del restaurante y la cena

reviews.title: Nice stop for Ha Giang city
reviews.text: The hotel is great with beautiful decoration, large room and good location, really great value for money

reviews.title: Excelente. El mejor de la ciudad
reviews.positives: Todo.  Buena decoración.  Personal súper amable. Instalaciones muy buenas. Buen desayuno
reviews.negatives: Por decir algo, que el restaurante no sirve comida después de las 10 pm

reviews.title: Beautiful room
reviews.text: nice comfortable bedding. American size bath robes . Breakfast good

reviews.title: Recomendable para una noche de paso en Ha Giang.
reviews.positives: Buenas instalaciones y ubicación.
reviews.negatives: Nada.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Super lush.

reviews.title: Un hotel fantástico en un enclave admirable
reviews.positives: La amabilidad del personal, las instalaciones, la piscina, el desayuno la limpieza

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel
reviews.text: This hotel provides a delightful respite after a long day of travel, offering a truly relaxing atmosphere.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Espectacular. Nuevo. Impecable.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Excellent  hotel, will return

reviews.title: Para repetir
reviews.positives: La piscina, gimnasio todo en si
reviews.negatives: La cena la veo cara por lo que ofrecen

reviews.title: Hà Giang travel tour
reviews.text: The hotel is convenient, clean, and the staff is polite and attentive. Our little ones really enjoyed it.

reviews.title: Pas terrible
reviews.positives: Le style ,tout était beau !
reviews.negatives: Tout était cher ! Ils nous ont fait payer le linge 100€ alors qu’un liquide est inférieur à 1€ et il y’avait même pas 1kg de linge , ensuite rien n’était ouvert des 3 emplacements de restauration , service lents

reviews.title: Amazing hotel
reviews.text: We loved our stay at 4 points. The room was spacious and clean with an amazing view of Ha Giang.  The complementary facilities were also great and we basically had it to ourselves. Was very sad leaving and was favourite stay of our trip

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Propre, chambres confortables
reviews.negatives: Le service vraiment pas terrible. Plus d'1h d'attente pour un plat commandé au restaurant. J'ai dû renoncer au reste de ma commande tellement l'attente était longue. Au niveau du service de la réception j'ai déjà fait remonter ma déception sur l'extra bed payant et cher alors que j'avais payé pour 2 adultes et 3 enfants.

reviews.title: The room is very beautiful and quite affordable compared to the quality.
reviews.text: The room is clean and beautiful, everything is okay for a price of 1 million VND without breakfast, which is quite reasonable.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: C'est un très bel hôtel au point de vue décoration et ameublement .
reviews.negatives: Malheureusement malgré une belle chambre avec vue sur la vallée,  il y a une forte odeur de moisissure du fait  qu'il n'y a pas d'extracteur d'air dans la salle de bain et qu'il est impossible d'ouvrir les fenêtres pour aérer. Quant au restaurant nous y avons diné 3 soirs presque seuls dans la salle et je dois avouer que la cuisine n'est pas à la hauteur de ce que l'on est en droit d'attendre d'un tel établissement. Je me demande qui a eu l'idée d'implanter un tel établissement avec une si belle architecture dans une ville où il y a peu de chose à  voir et peu d'intérêt culturel si ce n'est de faire  la loop de Ha Giang en scooter.

reviews.title: Really nice!
reviews.text: Loved it here, so beautiful and great value for money

reviews.title: Quelque peu déçus
reviews.positives: L’hôtel est à la hauteur de son standing, en excellent état, très bien équipé, les chambres sont très belle.
reviews.negatives:
La climatisation, dans la chambre et dans la salle du petit déjeuner, est beaucoup trop bruyante (c’était aussi le cas de la musique). Nous avons été obligé de la couper pour dormir. 
Le minibar était vide, le petit déjeuner de qualité moyenne et les boissons étaient presques toutes vides.

reviews.title: Best hotel in Ha Giang
reviews.text: Nice, spacious room and very clean. Attentive staff. Perfect place to start your Ha Giang Loop.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Personnels aux petits soins 
Petit déjeuner très très bien même parfait
reviews.negatives: Situation peut être un peu loin pour des personnes a pied

reviews.title: Crazy good deal
reviews.text: Absolutely incredible! Can’t recommend enough!

reviews.title: Parfait pour une nuit dans cette ville de transition
reviews.positives: Tout était parfait de très grande qualité
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Amazing hotel
reviews.text: Clean, stunning architecture, awesome pool and spa, great staff and good location.

reviews.title: On a adoré
reviews.positives:
Le confort!!🤩
On a aussi adoré l’espace offert par la chambre, la vue, le buffet petit déjeuner incroyable,..
reviews.negatives: Mention d’un bar rooftop qui n’était finalement jamais ouvert ?

reviews.title: Stunning hotel
reviews.text: Luxurious. Everything new. Gym pool sauna all great. Staff so nice especially reception and rooftop bar. Imy only suggestion is to offer food in the bar. Special mention to Vincent who gave lots of advice about local food and culture

reviews.title: Excellent séjour après un Ha Giang Loop
reviews.positives:
Lieu fantastique
La chambre avec une vue incroyable
Le personnel adorable (ils nous ont aidé à distance pour un taxi…)
reviews.negatives: Le restaurant seulement

reviews.title: Very great
reviews.text: Everything from the location to the facilities is great and worth it. In Ha Giang city, you can still swim in the heated pool during the cold season. The gym provides towels and has a modern treadmill and exercise equipment.

reviews.title: Très bon séjour avant de faire le Ha Giang Loop
reviews.positives:
Personnel adorable
Lieu fantastique 
La vue depuis la chambre était incroyable !
reviews.negatives:

reviews.title: amazing stay
reviews.text: this place has everything you could wish for. friendly reception. gym is amazing, room service oustanding (although portions are small! beware if you're really hungry) and the view is just mindblowing.

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.text: Beautiful hotel, great price, clean, big rooms, quiet and pleasant. Perfect to explore the city and or for before and after the Ha Giang Loop. They can stay with bags while you do the loop. 100 recommended.

reviews.title: Un confort à l’européenne
reviews.positives:
Hôtel au top au niveau des infrastructures, salle de sport, piscine, restaurant et déjeuner. 
Le personnel est aussi soucieux de votre bien être et vous pouvez évidemment le solliciter pour vos demandes de transports ou d’informations. 

Seul bémol, la climatisation était en panne lors de notre première nuit et fait pas mal de bruit lorsqu’elle fonctionne. 

Néanmoins, je recommande fortement cet hôtel dans la région.

reviews.title: excellent
reviews.text: My husband and I had a comfortable night. We arrived in Ha Giang city at 8 p.m. The staff were very friendly and changed the two beds into one bed for us. The room was very clean and convenient, and we had a good sleep here. The breakfast was delicious. We will come back next time.

reviews.title: Luxueux hôtel ! Un pur bonheur !

reviews.title: 5-star caliber

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Clean interview, friendly staff.
reviews.text: The staff are wonderful, friendly, open, and ready to help when needed. The room is spacious, beautiful, and well-equipped. It's very worth the cost.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
J’ai passé une excellente nuit dans cet hôtel après cinq jours intenses à parcourir la boucle de Ha Giang en moto. Le matelas était incroyablement confortable, exactement ce qu’il me fallait pour bien récupérer. La chambre était parfaitement équipée, propre et très agréable à vivre.

Mention spéciale pour le petit déjeuner : magnifique, avec beaucoup de choix et une vraie qualité dans chaque plat. Un moment délicieux pour commencer la journée.

Je recommande vivement cet établissement !

reviews.title: Best hotel in HG
reviews.text: Everything here is excellent. We will stay here if we visit Ha Giang next time. Thanks for well-trained staff, the cleanliness and excellent facilities!

reviews.title: Un palace reste un palace, bravo!
reviews.positives: Tout! Un palace à ce prix là je n’ai toujours pas compris! Rooftop très sympathique et des gens souriants et accueillants.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: Spacious and modern

reviews.title: Hôtel confortable et service parfait
reviews.positives:
Super hôtel tout neuf, super prestation, le petit déjeuner est gigantesque est de bonne qualité. La literie est confortable, et la vue sur Ha Giang et les montagnes superbe. Après 3 jours en moto, le confort est grandement apprécié.
Ils ont même proposé un service de laundry très rapide pour qu’on reparte tôt le lendemain avec notre linge propre! 
Merci pour votre gentillesse

reviews.title: Base for Hazan tourism
reviews.text: Donban is the starting point for Meoback. You can interact with the locals. Everyone is polite.

reviews.title: Exceptional

Tout était parfait !

reviews.positives:
Tout! C’était absolument parfait! La chambre et tous les espaces d’accueil sont magnifiques, le confort optimal, et la vue depuis la chambre juste incroyable! Même le petit déjeuner est exceptionnel! On aurait voulu rester un jour de plus!
On a adoré s’offrir ce confort après 5 jours de moto sur la boucle de Ha Giang!
reviews.negatives: Seul bémol, la Clim est un peu bruyante (pas de fonction “sleep”)

esta unicado perfecto para comenzar el loop y como un hotel de la familia Marriot, es todo perfecto, la ducha una maravilla que se echa de menos en estos paises, la cama digna de un hotel 4 estrellas, habitacion igual y el desayuno muy bueno. 

es un hotel construido creo que hace 2 años y se nota esta todo muy nuevo. 

recomndable 100%

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
Good Hotel, fantastic modern large rooms, great food, BUT: there was no warm water. I get that this may have been a temporary defect and that the hotel was only recently out into service but for a hotel of this class it is unusual..

Would still recommend

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Tolle Ausstattung, sehr stilvoll!
reviews.negatives: Frühstücksauwahl war sehr limitiert, für den Preis von ca. 250.000 Dong könnte man dafür mehr erwarten.

reviews.title: Top Hotel in Vietnams Norden.
reviews.text: Tolles Hotel, da es relativ neu ist mit exklusiver Ausstattung. Sehr sauber und sehr gutes Frühstück. Kann mir nicht vorstellen ein besseres Hotel in Ha Giang zu finden. Gehobenes europäisches Niveau.

reviews.title: Gute Lage in Ha Giang
reviews.positives: Sehr zentrale Lage , sehr schöne Zimmer mit großem Bad , im Zimmer sauber , freundliches Personal , guter service
reviews.negatives: Insgesamt nicht überall sauber , wenn es schon eine Rooftop Bar gibt sollte die auch aufhaben , Essen gut aber im Vergleich zu teuer ,

reviews.title: Sehr schönes Hotel in Ha Giang
reviews.text: Tolles 5-Sterne-Hotel mit sehr günstigen Preisen. Einziger Abzug für die ständig rauschende Klimaanlage.

reviews.title: Das beste Hotel in Ha Giang
reviews.positives:
Wir wollten eigentlich nur eine Nacht hier bleiben und fanden es so toll, dass wir zweimal verlängert haben. Das Hotel ist sehr neu und dementsprechend waren wenig andere Gäste da. 

Wir haben vor und nach dem Ha Giang Loop hier übernachtet und in der Zwischenzeit unser Gepäck im Hotel gelassen. 

Das Personal an der Rezeption ist sehr freundlich, kann super Englisch. Sie haben sich viel Zeit für unsere Fragen genommen. Sie haben uns zudem dabei unterstützt einen Transfer zurück nach Hanoi zu organisieren. 

Einziger Kritikpunkt: wir finden das Preis-Leistungsverhältnis beim Frühstück sehr schlecht. Die Kaffeemaschine ging nicht, fast alle Tische waren dreckig und das Personal hat es nicht abgeräumt obwohl sie nichts zutun hatten, das Personal konnte kein Wort Englisch, weshalb wir eine falsche Eierspeise bekommen haben, es lief sehr laute Musik die auch noch dauernd gestockt hat. Das war sehr nervig. Wir würden nicht nochmal das Frühstück buchen.

reviews.title: Tolles Hotel mit Charisma
reviews.text:
Erst kürzlich erbaut, bietet dieses Hotel Luxus pur. Grosse geschmacksvoll eingerichtete Zimmer. Einen tollen Spa Bereich, und ein unglaubliches Preis-/Leistungsverhältnis.
Das Personal sowie das Management sind ausserordentlich höflich und zuvorkommend. Sollte ich wieder in dieser schönen Gegend sein, werde ich auf jeden Fall wieder hier logieren.

reviews.title: Super Hotel zu einem akzeptablen Preis
reviews.positives: Mitarbeiter waren sehr nett und zuvorkommend. Lage top, Ausstattung und Sauberkeit sehr westlich geprägt.
reviews.negatives: Öffnungszeiten der Bar. Lange Wartezeit bei Essen und Getränken im Restaurant

reviews.title: Top Hotel
reviews.text: Sehr gutes Hotel mit tollem Frühstück und super Ausblick auf die Stadt

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Sehr schön und modern. Gutes Preisleistungsverhältnis
reviews.negatives: Room was quite humid

reviews.title: Alles proper en netjes
reviews.text: Laatste dag was de ontbijt wel veel minder uitgebreid dan de dag ervoor,over het algemeen mooi en proper hotel

reviews.title: Empfehlung
reviews.positives: Alles top.
reviews.negatives: Alles gut.

reviews.title: Fantastisch hotel
reviews.text: Heerlijk bed, geweldig ontbijt, mooi zwembad, goede gym.

reviews.title: Schönes Hotel mit echtem Wohlfühlfaktor
reviews.positives: Das Ambiente ist toll. Personal extrem hilfsbereit und sehr freundlich

reviews.title: Uitstekend!
reviews.text: Ontbijt perfect,  kamer prachtig, personeel behulpzaam. Aanrader!

reviews.title: Fast perfekt
reviews.positives: Saubere, große, komfortable Zimmer. Sehr viel Personal, das überwiegend gut englisch spricht.
reviews.negatives: Wir waren 9:15 Uhr beim Frühstück, das bis 10:30 Uhr geht und es wurde nichts mehr nachgefüllt. Man wurde aufgrund der relativ großen Auswahl trotzdem satt aber bei dem Standard ist es meiner Meinung nach nicht okay, dass die guten Sachen nicht mehr nachgefüllt werden.

reviews.title: Prachtig hotel
reviews.text: Na onze Ha Giang-loop  heerlijk relaxed in dit prachtige hotel.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: gutes, neues Business Hotel. Zimmer sind geräumig und sauber mit tollen Blick auf die Stadt. Frühstück gibt es als zwei Menüs, vietnamesisch oder kontinental, völlig ausweichend und gut.

reviews.title: Ideal für etwas Luxus zwischendurch oder auch für länger
reviews.positives: Ein neues und sehr schönes 4* Hotel, absolut auf westlichem Standard. Personal an der Rezeption spricht sehr gut Englisch und ist extrem freundlich und zuvorkommend. Wir reisten mit dem Motorrad an und konnten dies direkt gegenüber auf einem bewachten Parkplatz abstellen. Nach einigen Nächten in sehr einfachen Unterkünften blieben wir hier für 2 Nächte und gönnten uns etwas Luxus. Die Lage ist zwar recht zentral, durch die gut gedämmten Fenster konnten wir aber trotzdem sehr gut schlafen.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Liebe und hilfsbereite Dame an der Rezeption, wir haben sogar ein Zimmer Upgrade bekommen - ein Traum von Suite 

Fitness, Sauna und Wellness...alles vorhanden - Luxus pur

Massage im Hotel war eine Wohltat
reviews.negatives: Sauna Düfte etwas heißer sein, aber das ist Geschmackssache

reviews.title: Khách sạn đẹp
reviews.text: Khách sạn đẹp, nhân viên bình thường. Nhận phòng lúc 10h tối ko có nhân viên xách vani và hd khách.
reviews.response:
Thân gửi Long,

Cảm ơn bạn đã chia sẻ đánh giá. 

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết bạn ấn tượng với vẻ đẹp của khách sạn. Tuy nhiên, chúng tôi xin lỗi về sự thiếu sót trong dịch vụ của nhân viên khi bạn nhận phòng vào lúc muộn. Chúng tôi sẽ xem xét và cải thiện quy trình để đảm bảo rằng mọi khách hàng đều nhận được sự phục vụ chu đáo và nhiệt tình, ngay cả vào những giờ nhận phòng muộn. Mong được đón tiếp bạn trong những lần tiếp theo với trải nghiệm tốt hơn.

Trân trọng,

Bùi Xuân Đăng
Tổng Quản lý

reviews.title: Alles top!
reviews.positives: Wir hatten einen super Aufenthalt im Four Points by Sheraton in Ha Giang. Sehr nettes Personal, saubere Zimmer und eine großartige Aussicht. Frühstück war lecker, Sauna, beheizter Pool und Fitnessbereich top gepflegt. Außerdem war das Hotel kaum besucht – perfekt zum Entspannen nach dem Ha-Giang-Loop. Klare Empfehlung! Preis-Leistungsverhältnis top!

reviews.title: Super Hotel in Ha Giang
reviews.positives: Sehr freundliches Personal, Zimmer groß und sehr sauber. Fitnessraum und Poolanlage waren auch super, und alles sauber. Beim Frühstücksbuffet ist für jeden was dabei.

reviews.title: Preis-Leistung ausgezeichnet!
reviews.positives: Im Verhältnis zu den teuren Hotels in Hanoi ist diese Unterkunft in Ha Giang eine besser ausgestattete und günstigere Variante, seinen Urlaub gemütlich und sehr komfortabel zu verbringen. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Das Frühstück ist fantastisch und es steht eine sehr große Auswahl zur Verfügung, sollte für jeden Geschmack etwas dabei sein.

reviews.title: Du lịch Tết
reviews.text:
Ks sạch, đẹp
Ăn sáng đến 10h nhưng 9h đồ đã hết và không thấy được phục vụ thêm. Đồ ăn sáng ít, không phong phú
reviews.response:
Kính chào Quý khách, 

Lời đầu tiên, Four Points by Sheraton Hà Giang xin cảm ơn Quý khách đã để lại những phản hồi chân thực nhất cho khách sạn. Chúng tôi rất lấy làm tiếc khi Quý khách đã có những trải nghiệm chưa tốt trong quá trình lưu trú. Chúng tôi sẽ rút kinh nghiệm và cải thiện chất lượng dịch vụ ăn sáng để mang tới cho Quý khách những trải nghiệm tốt hơn trong tương lai. Rất mong, trong thời gian tới, khách sạn Four Points by Sheraton Hà Giang sẽ có cơ hội được tiếp đón du khách quay trở lại Hà Giang. 

Trân trọng cảm ơn!

Bùi Xuân Đăng
Tổng Quản lý

reviews.text: rất tốt nhưng các quán ăn rất ít ở vị trí gần hotel

reviews.title: Wir würden gerne wieder kommen
reviews.positives:
Es war alles richtig gut. Das Haus ist sehr sauber und das Personal super freundlich. 
Das Frühstück war perfekt und für jeden etwas dabei.
reviews.negatives:
Das es außerhalb der Zimmer sehr nach fekalien gerochen hat. 
Außerdem wäre es echt toll wenn das Personal mehr in Englisch geschult wäre und die Kellner/rin nicht erst fünf man rufen müssten um ein Cocktail zu mixen. 
Aber auch der Service im Restaurant sollte besser geschult sein. 
Das ist kein meckern sondern einfach ein Vorschlag

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: My kids love the indoor swimming pool.
reviews.response:
Dear Van,

Thank you for your fantastic review of Four Points by Sheraton Ha Giang! We're delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay and appreciated our services. Your kind words inspire us to keep providing exceptional experiences. We look forward to welcoming you back soon!

Best regards,

Bui Xuan Dang
General Manager

reviews.title: Super modernes Hotel mit schönen Zimmern
reviews.positives: Schöne große und neue Zimmer, das Bett war nicht zu hart und die Klimaanlage sehr angenehm. Alles in allem super Hotel auch wenn es für Asiatische Verhältnisse etwas teurer ist.
reviews.negatives: Wir waren je eine Nacht vor dem Ha Giang Loop und danach in dem Hotel und beim zweiten Zimmer hat die Temperaturregulierung der Dusche nicht funktioniert. Zudem war die Wäsche waschen so teuer wie die Übernachtung aber hier könnte man auch einfach einen günstige Laundry Service suchen

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Khách quá quá đẹp!
reviews.response:
Dear Thuy,

Thank you for taking the time to rate Four Points by Sheraton Ha Giang. We truly appreciate your feedback and look forward to welcoming you back in the near future.

Best regards,

Bui Xuan Dang
General Manager

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Mới, ngon bổ rẻ
reviews.response:
Dear Pham,

Thank you so much for leaving a review of your recent stay at Four Points by Sheraton Ha Giang. We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed your experience with us and that our team was able to provide you with the level of service and comfort you deserve.

Your kind words mean a lot to us, and we're grateful for your feedback. We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back to our hotel in the future.

Warmest regards,

Bui Xuan Dang
General Manager

reviews.title: Wir waren sehr zufrieden
reviews.positives: Das ganze Hotel ist noch sehr neu und daher sehr modern. Die Zimmer sind sehr ansprechend, in einem schönen modernen Design! Außerdem war unser Zimmer makellos sauber, sodass wir uns sehr wohl gefühlt haben.
reviews.negatives: Wenn ich etwas negatives anmerken müsste, dann dass die Matratze ein wenig zu hart für unser Gefühl war und dass der TV leider kein wirklicher Smart TV ist uns sich somit nicht mit Netflix etc verbinden lässt.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: We had a wonderful stay at this hotel and couldn’t be more satisfied. The room was clean, comfortable, and well maintained, with everything I needed for a relaxing stay. The staff were incredibly friendly, professional, and always willing to help, which made me feel very welcome. The location was convenient. Overall, it was a great experience with excellent service and comfort. I would definitely recommend this hotel and would be happy to stay here again.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Hotel 5 stelle con tutti i comfort. Spa, piscina e palestra 24/7. Colazione varia e cibo del ristorante molto buono.
